creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text: Electrum is currently not available as a package in the quarterly branch (2023Q2) for AMD64 or any other architecture. The reason for this is that Electrum has a large number of dependencies, directly or indirectly relying on 474 ports. Unfortunately, some of these ports are currently broken in the quarterly branch. Once these issues are resolved and the necessary fixes are backported, an Electrum package will be created and made available.
